steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 500 x g, °C, for 00:10:00 to separate plasma from whole blood.

Pour or pipet blood into each 50 mL conical tube. Each tube should be relatively equal volume. Do not exceed 20 mL of whole blood per 50 mL conical tube. To maximize yield, using a 10 mL serological pipette, rinse blood tubes with 5 mL DPBS/2 tubes. Add PBS/blood mixture to collection 50 mL conical tube after rinses.
Make a 1:1 DPBS/Blood mixture. Fill up 50 mL tube with PBS to whatever twice the initial volume of whole blood was per tube.
Gently invert 50 mL tubes to mix.
Using a 10 mL serological pipet, aspirate 12.5 mL Lymphoprep STEMCELL Technologies Inc. Catalog #18060 Gently place pipet into bottom of 50 mL conical and remove the entire pipette from pipet aid.
Wait for the pipette to drain. A layer of Ficoll will form at the bottom.

Lift pipette up and stop at the interface, wait 00:00:03 (for the last 1 mL of Ficoll to release), cap the pipette with your fingers, and continue to lift the pipette entirely out of the 50 mL conical tub.
Centrifuge 800 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 acceleration at 4, deceleration at 4 Room temperature .
After 00:30:00 , transfer PBMC layer to new 50 mL collection tube. Do not touch the red blood cell pellet.
Make a 1:1 PBMC layer/DPBS. Fill up 50 mL conical tube to whatever twice the volume of the PBMC layer, cap, and invert to mix.
Pour off supernatant with one quick motion. Resuspend pellet with 10 mL PBS. If you have multiple tubes use the same 10 mL to resuspend and wash all 4. Repeat rinse with another 10 mL DPBS.
Fill up resuspended pellet up to 50 mL DPBS.
Invert 50 mL conical tube to mix. If you are counting, aliquot 10 µL of resuspension.

Centrifuge 400 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 max acceleration: 9 and max deceleration: 9 Room temperature . During the spin, count cells and/or roughly estimate the total # of PBMCs you have. 1-2 million PBMCs/mL (whole blood) is the expected range.
Pour off supernatant. Resuspend pellet 10-20e 6 cells/ 1 mL Bambanker Cell Freezing Media Bulldog Bio Catalog #BB05 and mix.
Transfer aliquots quickly to Room temperature Mr. Frosty with IPA and transfer to -80 °C .
Centrifuge 400 x g, °C, 00:08:00 max acceleration: 9 and max deceleration: 9 Room temperature .
Remove 5 mL of plasma, mix by inversion or pipet and aliquot into 1 mL of plasma
Replace volume of removed plasma with equal volume of DPBS, no calcium, no magnesium Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #14190144 .

Remove as much of PBMC layer as you can on first pass, then move on to the next tube. After you have done all the tubes, repeat again as a second pass. If you position the pipette so that the end of the pipette is touching the 50 mL conical tube wall and the tip is touching the front of the tube, you can stabilize your hand this way.
Uncap your finger from the pipette and transfer the liquid into the liquid waste.
Collect ten blood in K2EDTA Vacutainer Tubes Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #366643 from human
